calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-14-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Linda Colfax, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: T. Ward #11918.

David Whitman, Esq. for Plaintiff: Xenia S. Villamejor.
Plaintiff's Witness Finola Villamejor was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendants Juan Cruz and Maria Villanueva.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 72 Ottowa Ave., San Francisco, CA. 94112.
The lease is forfeited.
Damages - $12,843.24
Costs - $320.00.
Attorney fee per memo of cost.
Counsel to prepare the Judgment and submitted to Dept. 514 for signature.

03-15-11 Proposed Judgment submitted and signed by Judge Colfax.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.

Appearances:

David Whitman, Esq. for Plaintiff Xenia Villamejor.
Cesar Alvarez, Esq. representing the Defendant Juan Cruz through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem: Sam Law, litigant(s) and counsel confer privately in Room 502, 503, 504, 502-B for settlement discussions.

Case did not settle, Trial Date confirmed.
